side_effects.description: CJC-1295 becomes cloudy and suspended approximately 4 days after reconstitution. Occurred in 2 out of 3 vials. Issue did not occur in first vial which did not have alcohol wipes in storage bag.

protocol_notes: CJC-1295: 2mg reconstituted with 2ml bacteriostatic water in 3ml vial. Stored in fridge door in Ziploc bag wrapped in paper towel with alcohol wipes. Tirzepatide 60mg mixed the same way in Ziploc bag with alcohol wipes - no issues reported. First CJC-1295 vial had no issues and did not contain alcohol wipes in storage bag.
